name: Wake Up Wukong
story_intro: Wukong wakes up on Flower Fruit Mountain. Help him count his monkey friends!

question.text: How many monkeys are there?

hints: Count each monkey one by one
Point to each monkey as you count

name: Peach Picking
story_intro: The peach trees are full of fruit! Help Wukong count the peaches.

question.text: How many peaches do you see?

name: Flowers on the Hill
story_intro: Beautiful flowers are blooming on the mountain. Can you count them?

question.text: How many flowers are blooming?

hints: Touch each flower as you count

name: One Little Monkey
story_intro: A tiny baby monkey is hiding behind a rock. How many monkeys can you find?

question.text: How many monkeys are hiding?

hints: There is just one little monkey

name: Stars Above the Mountain
story_intro: Night falls on Flower Fruit Mountain. Count the stars twinkling in the sky!

question.text: How many stars are in the sky?

reward.dialogue: The stars are shining for you!

hints: Use your finger to point at each one

name: Waterfall Treasure
story_intro: Wukong discovers a cave behind the waterfall! Count the gems inside.

question.text: How many gems are in the cave?

hints: Count slowly, there are more than five

name: Monkey Feast
story_intro: Bajie is preparing a feast! How many peaches does he have?

question.text: How many peaches are on the table?

reward.dialogue: So many peaches! Bajie is happy!

hints: Count each peach on the table

name: Cloud Jumping
story_intro: Wukong is learning to jump on clouds! Count the clouds he can reach.

question.text: How many clouds can Wukong jump on?

hints: Try counting in groups of two

name: Monkey King's Staff
story_intro: Wukong found some magical staffs! Which group has more?

question.text: Which side has more staffs?

hints: Count the staffs on each side

name: Peach or Flower?
story_intro: Help Sha Wujing sort these items into peaches and flowers!

question.text: Sort these into the right groups!

hints: Peaches are round fruit, flowers have petals

name: Monkey Friends Arrive
story_intro: Wukong has 2 monkey friends. 3 more come to play! How many now?

question.text: 2 monkeys plus 3 more monkeys. How many altogether?

name: Counting Butterflies
story_intro: Colorful butterflies flutter around the mountain. Count them all!

question.text: How many butterflies are flying?

name: Line Up Little Monkeys
story_intro: The little monkeys need to line up by number! Help put them in order.

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

hints: Which number comes first when we count?

name: Memory Game in the Cave
story_intro: Wukong found cards in the Water Curtain Cave! Match the pairs!

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

reward.dialogue: What a great memory you have!

hints: Try to flip two of the same kind

name: Ten Little Peaches
story_intro: The biggest peach tree has exactly ten peaches! Can you count them all?

question.text: How many peaches are on the tree?

hints: Group them into fives to make it easier

name: Mountain Maze
story_intro: Help Wukong find the path through the mountain to reach the peach tree!

question.text: Guide Wukong through the maze to the peach tree!

hints: Look for open paths without walls
Try going down first, then across

name: Who Has More?
story_intro: Wukong and Bajie are comparing their fruit. Who collected more?

question.text: Which side has more peaches?

hints: Left has 5, now count the right side

name: Monkey King Challenge
story_intro: Final challenge! Wukong has 4 peaches and finds 6 more. How many total?

question.text: 4 peaches plus 6 peaches. How many altogether?

reward.dialogue: You are the Monkey King of counting!

hints: Start at 4 and count up 6 more

name: Under the Sea
story_intro: Wukong dives into the ocean to visit the Dragon King! Count the fish swimming by.

question.text: How many fish are swimming?

hints: Count each fish as it swims past

name: Shells on the Floor
story_intro: The palace floor is covered in beautiful shells! Count them!

question.text: How many shells can you see?

hints: Count each shell one by one

name: Pearl Patterns
story_intro: The Dragon King has a string of pearls with a pattern. What comes next?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

name: Fish Friends
story_intro: Two groups of fish are playing. Which group has more?

question.text: Which side has more fish?

reward.dialogue: Good eye! The right side wins!

hints: 2 on the left and how many on the right?

name: Match the Sea Creatures
story_intro: Find the matching pairs hidden in the Dragon King's treasure chest!

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

hints: Remember where you saw each card
There are two pairs to find

name: Color Pearls
story_intro: The Dragon King's pearls follow a special pattern. Can you figure it out?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

hints: The pattern repeats every three items
Two pearls then one gem, two pearls then one gem...

name: Sort the Treasure
story_intro: Help Sha Wujing sort the Dragon King's treasures into the right boxes!

question.text: Sort these into gems and shells!

reward.dialogue: Everything in its place! Well done!

hints: Gems sparkle and shells are from the sea

name: Dragon Palace Memory
story_intro: The Dragon King tests Wukong's memory with more pairs! Can you help?

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

hints: Take your time to remember each card
There are four pairs to find

name: Spot the Difference
story_intro: Two rooms in the Dragon Palace look the same, but something is different!

question.text: What is different between the two rooms?

hints: Compare each item one by one
Look at the last item in each room

name: Growing Pattern
story_intro: The fish swim in a special pattern. Can you figure out what comes next?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

reward.dialogue: You see the pattern of the sea!

name: Underwater Counting
story_intro: Count all the pearls in the Dragon King's treasure vault!

question.text: How many pearls are in the vault?

name: Sea Creature Lineup
story_intro: Put the sea treasures in order from fewest to most!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

reward.dialogue: Perfect order! The Dragon King is impressed!

name: Palace Spot Check
story_intro: Two treasure displays look similar. Can you find all the differences?

question.text: What is different between the two displays?

hints: Check each item from left to right
Look at the middle items carefully

name: Triple Pattern
story_intro: The palace columns have a tricky pattern. Can you solve it?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

hints: The pattern repeats every three items
Two gems then one pearl keeps repeating

name: Ocean Maze
story_intro: Help Wukong swim through the underwater maze to reach the Dragon King!

question.text: Guide Wukong through the underwater maze!

hints: Avoid the walls made of coral

name: Royal Classification
story_intro: The Dragon King needs help sorting treasures into three groups!

question.text: Sort these into sea creatures, treasures, and sky things!

hints: Fish and shells come from the sea
Stars and clouds are in the sky

name: Dragon King's Test
story_intro: The Dragon King gives Wukong a final test. Find all the differences!

question.text: Find all the differences between the two treasure rooms!

reward.dialogue: The Dragon King bows to your wisdom!

hints: There are two things that changed

name: Heavenly Stairs
story_intro: Wukong climbs the stairs to Heaven! Count the steps.

question.text: How many stairs does Wukong climb?

hints: Count each step one by one

name: Cloud Counting
story_intro: Beautiful clouds float around the Heavenly Palace. How many are there?

question.text: How many clouds are floating?

name: Heavenly Peach Garden
story_intro: Wukong sneaks into the Peach Garden! Count the golden peaches!

question.text: How many golden peaches are there?

name: Star Order
story_intro: Help Tang Monk put the stars in order from smallest to biggest number!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

name: Heavenly Addition
story_intro: Wukong has 1 peach. He picks 2 more from the garden. How many now?

question.text: 1 peach plus 2 more peaches. How many altogether?

name: More Heavenly Peaches
story_intro: Wukong grabs 3 peaches, then finds 4 more hidden ones! How many total?

question.text: 3 peaches plus 4 more peaches. How many altogether?

reward.dialogue: So many peaches! Wukong is delighted!

hints: Count the first group: 3. Then add 4 more
Use your fingers to help count

name: Heavenly Feast
story_intro: Bajie sneaks into the heavenly feast! Help him count the dishes.

question.text: How many dishes are on the table?

reward.dialogue: Bajie cannot resist a good feast!

name: Star Addition
story_intro: Two groups of stars appear in the sky. Add them together!

question.text: 5 stars plus 3 more stars. How many altogether?

reward.dialogue: Eight stars light up the sky!

hints: Start at 5 and count up 3 more

name: Order the Clouds
story_intro: The heavenly clouds have numbers. Put them in order!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

name: Gem Addition
story_intro: Wukong finds 2 gems in one room and 5 in another. How many total?

question.text: 2 gems plus 5 gems. How many altogether?

hints: Count the first group: 2. Then add 5 more

name: Heavenly Comparison
story_intro: Two heavenly generals show their star collections. Who has more?

question.text: Which side has more stars?

reward.dialogue: Left side wins with more stars!

hints: 6 on the left, how many on the right?

name: Cloud Pattern
story_intro: The clouds form a special pattern across the sky!

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

reward.dialogue: The heavens reveal their secrets to you!

name: Bigger Numbers in Order
story_intro: Sort the bigger heavenly numbers from smallest to biggest!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

hints: 3 is the smallest, what comes next?

name: Adding More Stars
story_intro: Wukong collects 4 stars and then finds 4 more. How many stars now?

question.text: 4 stars plus 4 stars. How many altogether?

name: Heavenly Sort
story_intro: Help Sha Wujing sort items from Heaven and Earth!

question.text: Sort these into sky things and earth things!

hints: Stars and clouds belong in the sky
Flowers and peaches grow on the ground

name: Big Addition Challenge
story_intro: Wukong has 6 peaches and steals 4 more from the garden! How many total?

question.text: 6 peaches plus 4 more peaches. How many altogether?

hints: Start at 6 and count up 4 more

name: Heaven's Maze
story_intro: Wukong must escape from Heaven through the cloud maze!

question.text: Help Wukong escape through the cloud maze!

hints: Look for open paths between the clouds
Sometimes you need to go around walls

name: Heavenly Final Test
story_intro: The Jade Emperor challenges Wukong! Add these big numbers!

question.text: 5 gems plus 5 gems. How many altogether?

reward.dialogue: Even the Jade Emperor is amazed!

name: Into the Cave
story_intro: The travelers enter a spooky cave! Count the bones on the ground.

question.text: How many bones are on the ground?

reward.dialogue: Do not be scared! Wukong is here!

name: Spot the Trick
story_intro: The White Bone Demon is tricky! Find what is different between two scenes.

question.text: What is different between these two pictures?

hints: Look at each item in both scenes

name: Cave Memory
story_intro: Remember what you see in the cave to help the team!

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

hints: There are two pairs to find

name: Sort the Real and Fake
story_intro: Help Sha Wujing sort items into real treasures and fake bones!

question.text: Sort these into treasures and bones!

name: Which Has More Bones?
story_intro: Two piles of bones in the cave. Which pile is bigger?

question.text: Which side has more bones?

reward.dialogue: Left pile is bigger! Watch out!

hints: 4 on the left, 2 on the right

name: Disguise Differences
story_intro: The demon disguises herself twice! Spot the differences between her two forms.

question.text: What changed between the two disguises?

name: Cave Classification
story_intro: Sort items from the cave into food, tools, and nature!

question.text: Sort these items into the right groups!

hints: Staff and fan are tools you can use

name: Cave Memory Challenge
story_intro: A harder memory challenge in the dark cave!

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

hints: Take your time with each card

name: Three Disguises
story_intro: The demon transforms three times! Spot what changes each time.

question.text: What is different between the two scenes?

name: Odd One Out
story_intro: Tang Monk teaches: which item does not belong with the others?

question.text: Which item does not belong with the others?

reward.dialogue: Wisdom shows us what does not fit!

hints: Most items are the same kind
Which one is different from the rest?

name: Cave Counting Challenge
story_intro: Deep in the cave, count all the hidden bones!

question.text: How many bones are hidden in the cave?

reward.dialogue: Eight bones found in the dark!

name: Pattern in the Dark
story_intro: Strange patterns appear on the cave walls. What comes next?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

hints: The pattern alternates between two items

name: Memory Master
story_intro: The ultimate memory test! Can you find all five pairs?

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

name: Tricky Sorting
story_intro: Sort the cave items into living things and non-living things!

question.text: Sort these into living and non-living things!

hints: Flowers, monkeys, and fish are alive
Gems, pearls, and bones are not alive

name: Double Differences
story_intro: The demon's final trick has two differences! Can you find them both?

question.text: Find all the differences!

reward.dialogue: Two tricks found! Wukong saves the day!

hints: There are two things that changed

name: Cave Escape Maze
story_intro: Quick! Help the team escape the cave before the demon returns!

question.text: Find the way out of the cave!

reward.dialogue: We escaped the White Bone Cave!

hints: Find a clear path to the exit
Go down and around the walls

name: Demon Defeated
story_intro: Final challenge! The demon shows six pairs of cards. Match them all to win!

question.text: Find all six matching pairs to defeat the demon!

hints: Focus hard on remembering each card
Six pairs is a big challenge. Take your time!

name: Flaming Mountain Arrival
story_intro: The Flaming Mountain blocks the path! Count the flames!

question.text: How many flames can you see?

hints: Count each flame one by one

name: Fan Away the Flames
story_intro: Wukong had 5 flames but the magic fan blew away 2. How many are left?

question.text: 5 flames take away 2. How many are left?

hints: Cover 2 flames and count the rest

name: Cooling Down
story_intro: There were 4 flames. Wukong put out 1. How many remain?

question.text: 4 flames take away 1. How many are left?

hints: Cover one flame and count the rest

name: Hot Comparison
story_intro: Two sides of the mountain have flames. Which side is hotter?

question.text: Which side has more flames?

reward.dialogue: The right side is really hot!

hints: Count the flames on each side
3 on the left, how many on the right?

name: Bajie's Snack Break
story_intro: Bajie had 3 peaches but ate 1. How many are left?

question.text: 3 peaches take away 1. How many are left?

name: Big Flame Subtraction
story_intro: There are 8 flames. The magic fan blows away 3. How many remain?

question.text: 8 flames take away 3. How many are left?

name: Bajie Eats Again
story_intro: Bajie had 7 peaches and ate 4. How many are left for the team?

question.text: 7 peaches take away 4. How many are left?

name: Fire Comparison
story_intro: Which side of the mountain has more fire? Count carefully!

question.text: Which side has more flames?

hints: 7 on the left and 9 on the right

name: Subtract to Cool Down
story_intro: 10 flames are blazing! Wukong puts out 4. How many are left?

question.text: 10 flames take away 4. How many are left?

name: Flame Order
story_intro: Put these flame numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

hints: 3 is the smallest, what comes next?

name: Fire Pattern
story_intro: The flames form a pattern. Can you figure out what comes next?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

hints: Two flames then one fan repeats
The pattern has groups of three

name: Cool Subtraction
story_intro: 9 flames are burning. The team puts out 5. How many are left?

question.text: 9 flames take away 5. How many are left?

name: Mountain Maze
story_intro: Find the path around the Flaming Mountain!

question.text: Guide the team around the mountain!

hints: Look for safe paths without fire
Sometimes you need to go around

name: Big Comparison
story_intro: Two giant flame piles! Count carefully and compare!

question.text: Which side has more flames?

reward.dialogue: So many flames! You counted them all!

hints: 8 on the left, 10 on the right

name: Put Out All Flames
story_intro: Final battle! 10 flames and the team puts out 7! How many remain?

question.text: 10 flames take away 7. How many are left?

reward.dialogue: The mountain is almost cool! You did it!

name: The Journey Begins
story_intro: The team sets out on the road to the West! Count the travelers.

question.text: How many travelers are on the road?

hints: There are four friends on the journey

name: Roadside Flowers
story_intro: Pretty flowers line the road. Count them as you walk!

question.text: How many flowers are along the road?

hints: Count each flower along the path

name: Sharing Peaches
story_intro: Wukong has 5 peaches and gives 2 to Tang Monk. How many does he have left?

question.text: 5 peaches take away 2. How many are left?

name: Road Pattern
story_intro: The stepping stones make a pattern. What comes next?

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

name: Group Addition
story_intro: The team finds 3 scrolls in a temple and 2 more outside. How many total?

question.text: 3 scrolls plus 2 more scrolls. How many altogether?

hints: Count the first group: 3. Add the second: 2

name: River Crossing
story_intro: The team must cross a river! Help them add up the stepping stones.

question.text: 4 stones plus 5 more stones. How many altogether?

hints: Start at 4 and count up 5 more

name: Bajie's Lunch
story_intro: Bajie had 9 dumplings and ate 6. How many are left?

question.text: 9 peaches take away 6. How many are left?

name: Sort the Supplies
story_intro: Help Sha Wujing organize the travel supplies!

question.text: Sort these into things to eat and things to use!

hints: Peaches are food you can eat
Staff, fan, and scroll are tools

name: Road Memory
story_intro: Remember the landmarks along the road! Match the pairs!

question.text: Find all the matching pairs!

hints: Take your time with each card
There are five pairs to find

name: Journey Numbers
story_intro: Put the journey milestones in order from first to last!

question.text: Put these numbers in order from smallest to biggest!

reward.dialogue: Every step in its right place!

hints: 1 is the smallest, 10 is the biggest

name: Spot the Change
story_intro: A trickster changed something on the road! Can you spot it?

question.text: What is different between the two scenes?

hints: Compare each item one by one

name: Complex Pattern
story_intro: A mysterious pattern appears on the temple door. Solve it to enter!

question.text: What comes next in the pattern?

reward.dialogue: The temple door opens! Wisdom prevails!

hints: The pattern repeats every three items

name: Final Maze
story_intro: The last maze stands before the sacred temple! Guide the team through!

question.text: Navigate through the final maze!

hints: This maze is bigger. Take your time!
Try going right first, then find a path down

name: Grand Challenge
story_intro: A grand challenge awaits! Add and compare these big groups!

question.text: 3 gems plus 7 more gems. How many altogether?

hints: Start at 3 and count up 7 more
3 plus 7 equals the biggest number we know!

name: Journey Complete
story_intro: The team reaches the sacred temple at last! Complete the final challenge to collect the scriptures!

question.text: Put all these numbers in perfect order from smallest to biggest!

reward.dialogue: The journey is complete! You are a true hero!

hints: Find the smallest number and work your way up
